---
title: "annotation with lasso deconvolution algorithm"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#Preparazione dati (NON RIFARE)
```{r}
load("~/markers_deg.RData")
markers_bio <- readRDS("~/marker_genes_list_singleR_annot.rds")
multiome_sce <- readRDS("~/multiome_sce.rds")
load("~/markers_paper.RData")

markers_deg <- lapply(markers_deg, function(x) head(x, 20))
markers_deg <- markers_deg[names(markers_bio)]
markers_list <- tapply(
  names(markers_bio),
  names(markers_bio),
  function(n)
    unique(c(markers_deg[[n]], markers_bio[[n]]))
)
common_names <- intersect(names(markers_list), names(markers_paper))
markers_common <- tapply(
  common_names,
  common_names,
  function(n)
    unique(c(markers_list[[n]], markers_paper[[n]]))
)
markers <- c(
  markers_common,
  markers_list[!names(markers_list) %in% common_names]
)
save(markers,file = "markers_list_mixed.RData")

```





```{r}
#load("~/markers_list_mixed.RData")

#a matrix with the cell type gene signatures (log expression) to be used for deconvolution.
#Genes in row and cell types in columns.
library(scuttle)
pb_mult <- aggregateAcrossCells(multiome_sce, use.assay.type = "counts", 
                                id=DataFrame(label = multiome_sce$subclusters))
#prendo solo i markers
markers <- as.vector(unlist(markers_list))
markers <- unique(markers)
markers[markers == "Ncam"] <- "Ncam1"
markers[markers == "Cd140a"] <- "Pdgfra"
markers[markers == "Sca1"] <- "Atxn1"
pb_mult <- pb_mult[markers,]

```

#Deconvoluzione
```{r}
library(deconsgl)
?deconvolve
#Given a matrix of tumor samples and a matrix of cell type gene signatures,
#this function returns a vector of cell type composition.
load("~/subset_list.RData")
spe <- subset_list$sham_b1
spe <- logNormCounts(spe)
pb_mult <- logNormCounts(pb_mult)

library(BiocParallel)
common <- intersect(rownames(logcounts(spe)),
                    rownames(logcounts(pb_mult)))

X <- logcounts(spe)[common, ]
Y <- logcounts(pb_mult)[common, ]
var_genes <- rowVars(as.matrix(X)) > 1e-8
X <- X[var_genes, ]
Y <- Y[var_genes, ]

#lasso normale
dec_lasso <- deconvolve(X, Y,
                        d = 200, #length(lambda.seq)
                        alpha = 1,
                        purity = 1, #lambda.min
                        BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(10)) 

# Error in {: task 3 failed - "The algorithm has encountered a convergence problem
#    Try/check the following:
#    (1) Check the lambda sequence and try with a longer sequence (the length d should be larger than 100) 
#    (2) try with a larger lambda.min
#    (3) Ensure minimum one sample from each group/class present in all subsample (or cross validation) sets used 

#sparse group lasso
dec_lasso <- deconvolve(X, Y,
                        d = 200, #length(lambda.seq)
                        alpha = 0.5,
                        purity = 1, #lambda.min
                        groups = pb_mult$subclusters,
                        BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(10))

#dec_lasso$
# lsgl::cv
# lsgl::fit

```
